caveats: Fixed 80 m half-width is intentionally generous for review and does not represent channel width.
Lines use preview stationing normals and inherit the direction/CRS caveats of the mainstem stationing candidate.
No imagery, DEM, hydrology, or guide validation has accepted these seed lines yet.
promotion_gates: Compare each seed line against NAIP water edge, 3DEP terrain relief, and visible banks before deriving bank polygons.
Confirm production CRS and stationing before using these offsets for solver or Unreal geometry.
Clip, move, delete, or add cross sections in the editor based on guide-reviewed rapids, eddies, shelves, boulders, and access constraints.
Do not infer wetted width, bank truth, or hazard geometry from these fixed-width seed lines alone.
